fields.description: Shadow-live pilot mode: customer-facing OTP/WhatsApp/SMS/emails are suppressed and a master OTP unlocks OTP gates. Turns itself OFF after 'Active Until'.
fields.label: Shadow Live Mode Enabled

fields.description: Hard expiry — mode auto-disarms after this date even if left enabled.
fields.label: Active Until

fields.description: Staff enter this in place of the customer's OTP (invoice consent, buyback approval).
fields.label: Master OTP

fields.description: No WhatsApp / SMS / OTP emails go to customers while enabled.
fields.label: Suppress Customer Messages

fields.description: POS hides Paytm / Pine Labs terminals — staff key in card RRN / UPI reference manually and billing closes normally.
fields.label: Manual Card / UPI Entry (bypass payment machines)
Help
fields.options: Turn OFF (or let 'Active Until' lapse) at go-live. Nothing else to deploy — real OTPs, customer messages and payment terminals resume immediately.
